channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Iran targets US bases in Jordan, the Gulf after Trump orders strikes near Hormuz
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran Attacks US Bases In Jordan And Bahrain
- Iran attacks US bases in Jordan and Bahrain
- Iran attacks Bahrain, Kuwait, Jordan in retaliation for US strikes
- Iran targets US bases across the Middle East after strikes near Hormuz
- Middle East: Iran targets US bases in retaliatory strikes
- Iran targets American bases in Jordan and the Gulf after fresh US strikes near Hormuz
- Iran says it targeted US bases in Bahrain, Jordan and Kuwait, warns of stronger response
- Iran fires missiles at air base hosting U.S. forces in Jordan
- Iran attacks US bases in Jordan and Bahrain
- Iran Guards say targeted US base in Jordan with missiles
- Iran targets US base in Jordan
- Iran attacks Bahrain, Kuwait, Jordan in retaliation for US strikes
- Flash: Iran launches missile strike on U.S. base in Jordan -- media
- Iran attacks Kuwait, Bahrain, Jordan in retaliation for US strikes - report
- Iran targets US bases in Jordan and the Gulf after Trump orders strikes near Hormuz
- Iran targets US bases in Jordan and the Gulf after Trump orders strikes near Hormuz
- US Completes Strikes on Iran; Iran Retaliates With Attacks on Bahrain, Jordan Bases
- Iran Launches Attacks on Bahrain, Kuwait, and Jordan
- Iran targets US bases in Jordan and the Gulf after Trump orders strikes near Hormuz]]>
